title: dryopteris diacalpioides
intro: Dryopteris diacalpioides, also known as Chinese lady fern, is a species of fern native to China. It is known for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a variety of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, offering benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and promoting wound healing. Dryopteris diacalpioides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in some traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
